note: The full body of binding rules sits in many places. Where we have live data (federal bills, all-50-state bills, NY laws) we link straight in; for the rest — federal & state regulations and local ordinances — we route to the authoritative full-text sources.

groups.label: Federal laws (statutes)
groups.blurb: Bills that became law, and the codified United States Code.

groups.label: Federal regulations
groups.blurb: Rules agencies write to carry out statutes — the eCFR is the always-current full text.

links.name: eCFR — Electronic Code of Federal Regulations
Regulations.gov — read & comment on proposed rules

groups.label: State legislation
groups.blurb: Bills and laws in all 50 state legislatures.

groups.label: State regulations
groups.blurb: The rules state agencies issue (e.g., the NY Codes, Rules & Regulations — NYCRR).

links.name: Find your state's register / admin code

groups.label: Local ordinances & codes
groups.blurb: City, town, and county codes — most are published full-text in these libraries.
